summary: We are sprinting on two major report launches (China Going Global and Art Indices) while redesigning the knowledge website and prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs for SEO and campaign execution.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the China Going Global report with IE, targeting a September launch at Singapore events; the team is dividing sections, translating content, and Felix is preparing a one-pager and confirming venues. Concurrently, the knowledge website redesign is moving forward with Joker's homepage preferred, but feedback is due today to combine elements from Joseph's editorial layout. This week is critical: Joseph must provide the Google Analytics brief and initial SEO target list, Julie needs to adjust brochure figures and send the Asia Start article for review, and the team must finalize the social media agency selection (Media Minds leading) and expedite the Intelligent China webpage to go live. Additionally, the Mei Jianping Art Indices report is being drafted and distributed to global media this week, and the CKGSB-EuroCham EV event description and PO need finalization. Upcoming: Asia Start campaign will launch with two parallel routes (AI vs traditional), and the Intelligent China program webpage will enable SEO optimization and traffic driving starting next week.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: Team reviewed two homepage design proposals for the knowledge website, preferring Joker's version for its improved menu categorization but noting it's too similar to current design. They discussed combining elements from Joseph's more editorial layout to show more articles and indices.

meetings.title: SEO and Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses improving search visibility for CKGSB programs, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China, and reviewing Google Analytics conversion tracking setup.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, progress on brochures and videos, and challenges with social media agency selection and a difficult collaborator.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with op-eds from both schools' leadership and industry case studies, aiming for launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore in September.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Reviewed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional) and discussed new 'Intelligent China' program targeting foreigners, with modules in Beijing, Shanghai/Hangzhou, and Shenzhen.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in market operations.

actionItems.detail: Focus on these two programs due to high demand and tight timelines (Asia Star in Nov, Intelligent China in Dec).

decisions.text: Remove dedicated video section; videos will be dispersed by topic.
Keep school menu at top left and knowledge menu centered (preference noted).
Include indices (BCI, BSI) on knowledge homepage.
Asia Star and Intelligent China are top priority programs; US partnerships (Stanford, Columbia, Berkeley) are secondary.
Intelligent China webpage will be ready this week, enabling SEO optimization and traffic driving.
Menu categorization by topics is correct; will keep professor analysis separate.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu is needed, not two.
Zhu Yang's feedback is being generated by ChatGPT; team will not spend excessive time on it.
Media Minds is likely the best agency choice given budget constraints and time sensitivity.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with main research from Leeway and op-eds from both deans and possibly industry practitioners.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Target completion by early September for digital version to be ready for Singapore events.
Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for the first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, is in English, and has three modules; focus initially on module one in Beijing.
Use editorial design direction for Knowledge revamp
Use Flow for design of China Going Global report instead of in-house design
Invite four vendors (Impactable, Media Minds Global, 麦炽, 省广) for social media ad agency selection
decisions.meetingTitle: Request for Proposal - social media ad agency 2026 - updated
